description_long: This is a modern athletic shoe featuring a predominantly black mesh upper with vibrant orange accents around the collar, tongue, and laces. The shoe has a white, cushioned sole designed for comfort and support, with a visible pull tab at the heel for easy wearing. The mesh material provides breathability, while the synthetic overlays add structure and durability. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with two-tone laces, and the shoe includes a geometric logo on the lateral side. The overall design is sleek and sporty, suitable for urban environments and active use. The shoe appears to be in excellent condition, with no visible signs of wear or dirt.
description: A black and orange athletic shoe with a white cushioned sole, mesh upper, and standard criss-cross lacing. Features a geometric logo and a pull tab at the heel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black mesh upper, orange collar, and white sole, with the lacing and tongue clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the orange heel collar, black pull tab, and the width of the white sole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the geometric logo, mesh pattern, and orange detailing around the ankle.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the orange tongue, criss-cross lacing, and the rounded toe area.
attribute_logo: Triangular geometric logo on the lateral side in gray
